verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Get all exited go tell everybody that Jesus Christ is King Come on get all exited go tell everybody that Jesus Christ is King Get all exited go tell everybody that Jesus Christ is King Jesus Christ is still the king of king's

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You talk about peaple You talk about things that really aren't important at all You talk about weather You talk about problems we have here at home and abroad Get all exited on about of solution for the word Oh I'm gonna shout and sing Jesus Christ is still the king of king's
